title: Kazakhstan Individual Income Tax Declaration — Schedule 220.07 (Gratuitously Received/Transferred Property)
description: The Ministry of Finance of the Republic of Kazakhstan's "Форма 220.07 — Безвозмездно полученное (переданное) имущество (благотворительная помощь, спонсорская помощь, деньги и другое имущество)" (Form 220.07, gratuitously received (transferred) property — charitable assistance, sponsorship assistance, money and other property), Appendix 7 to the Individual Income Tax Declaration (Form 220.00, kz/kgd/individual-income-tax-declaration, GOV-3477). Filed with the State Revenue Committee (Комитет государственных доходов, KGD) as an attachment to Form 220.00 by non-commercial organizations reporting gratuitously received or transferred property, to determine their income amount. Approved within Appendix 9 to Order of the Minister of Finance of the Republic of Kazakhstan No. 695 of 12 November 2025 — the same combined appendix that houses the main Form 220.00 declaration and all ten of its companion schedules (220.01 through 220.10) — published in full, unauthenticated, on the Ministry of Justice's own legal-information system, ИПС «Әділет». This v1.0.0 models Form 220.07 in full across its three printed pages: the taxpayer-identification header, the form's own grand-total row (received and transferred property amounts), and 12 individual entry rows, each capturing the counterparty's BIN/IIN (if any), country-of-residence code, nonresident registration number, the type and code of the gratuitously received/transferred property, the confirming document's number and date, and the amount received or transferred. GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of the Republic of Kazakhstan or the State Revenue Committee.

authority.name: Комитет государственных доходов Министерства финансов Республики Казахстан (State Revenue Committee of the Ministry of Finance of the Republic of Kazakhstan)

source.documentRef: Приложение 9 к приказу Министра финансов Республики Казахстан от 12 ноября 2025 года № 695 — форма 220.07

verification.notes:
GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-3595, deepening Kazakhstan's Taxes vertical by authoring the seventh of the ten disclosed companion schedules to Form 220.00 (kz/kgd/individual-income-tax-declaration, GOV-3477) — Form 220.07, gratuitously received (transferred) property. Three prior cycles (GOV-3574, GOV-3581, GOV-3588) each independently re-confirmed adilet.zan.kz's image-serving endpoint (adilet.zan.kz/files/1576/49/*.jpg) down, the first two as an HTTP 200 'Ведутся технические работы' maintenance placeholder and the third (GOV-3588) as a changed HTTP 404 failure signature affecting even an unrelated document's own images. This cycle re-tested the exact same endpoint fresh (https://adilet.zan.kz/files/1576/49/170.jpg and several dozen neighboring image numbers, via curl -k) and found it fully recovered: every tested image (170, 182-200) returns a genuine HTTP 200 with a valid image/jpeg body (85-173 KB), including 182.jpg and 183.jpg, which even the GOV-3568 cycle's own successfully-completed Form 220.06 schema could not read due to a narrower, persistent 404 affecting only those two files at the time. This resolves the outage and reopens the Form 220.07-220.10 backlog the GOV-3574/3581/3588 cycles had each left blocked.

Independently re-fetched this cycle: https://adilet.zan.kz/rus/docs/V2500037390 (HTTP 200 via curl -k, 2,660,117-byte HTML). A fresh full-text search located Глава 9 ('Пояснение по составлению формы 220.07 – Безвозмездно полученное (переданное) имущество...', Items 37-39), immediately following Form 220.06's own closing Глава 8 with no intervening content, and immediately preceded by Глава 10 ('Пояснение по заполнению формы 220.08 – Доходы, полученные в МФЦА'), confirming the near boundary. Item 37 states the form's purpose (determining a non-commercial organization's income amount). Item 38 describes the two-line taxpayer-information header (IIN, with the same trust-manager substitution rule as every sibling schedule; tax period). Item 39 describes the calculation table's nine columns (A through I) field-by-field, including the enumerated four-value property-type classification in column E and the explicit statement that column F is not filled for propertyTypeCode '4' entries.

Image boundary, confirmed both by the Rules text (Глава 9 begins immediately after Глава 8's own Form 220.06 content, which the GOV-3568 cycle's own boundary check had already placed at images 182-187) and by direct visual read: image 188 is headed 'форма 220.07 стр.01', image 189 'форма 220.07 стр.02', image 190 'форма 220.07 стр.03', and image 191 is headed 'форма 220.08 стр.01' — confirming Form 220.07 spans exactly three pages (images 188-190) and Form 220.08 begins immediately after, a single-page form. All three pages were read directly at native resolution (images fetched fresh via curl -k, no rendering/scaling artifacts encountered). Page 1 (188) shows columns A (row ordinal, boxed, not modelled as a field, per this registry's established convention), B, C, and D, plus the printed footnote '* При получении отчислений на безвозмездной основе графы D и Е не заполняются'. Page 2 (189) shows columns A, E, F, G (split into a 'Номер' free-text sub-field and a 'Цифрами дня, месяца, года' date sub-field), and H (a ТРИЛ/МЛРД/МЛН/ТЫС-grouped digit-box money field, the same convention as every sibling schedule's money columns). Page 3 (190) shows columns A and I only.

Row count (12 individual entry rows plus a distinct row-1 grand-total row, 13 boxed rows total per page): confirmed by a pixel-luminance horizontal-border scan (a small Node script reading raw pixel data via the sharp npm package, reused from a prior cycle's /tmp/kz22004 scratch install) down column A's row-number box area on image 188, detecting 13 evenly-pitched (~23-24px) border-line clusters bounding 12 full row intervals below the fixed '00000001' first row — corroborated by a direct visual crop of the same column. The first row ('00000001') is captioned, in column B's position on page 1, 'ИТОГО (строка заполняется ТОЛЬКО по итогу формы)' ('TOTAL — row filled ONLY for the form's grand total'), an explicit instruction not present on any prior sibling schedule in this series. Despite this caption, the printed table still shows boxes for columns C, D (page 1) and E, F, G, H (page 2) on this same row-1 position — this schema treats those boxes as structurally present but semantically inapplicable to a grand-total row (no country/property/document identity attaches to a total) and models only the row's two money columns (H, I) as dedicated totalAmountReceivedAmount / totalAmountTransferredAmount fields, per this registry's established convention for this series' own 'ИТОГО'-row total fields (e.g. kz/kgd/individual-income-tax-declaration-schedule-220-04's totalForeignCurrencyAmount and siblings). The 12 individual entry rows (rows 2-13 by printed row-ordinal, modelled as entry1 through entry12) are modelled with all nine columns.

Column B is modelled as a 12-digit BIN/IIN per Item 39(2)'s own text (Kazakhstan's unified BIN/IIN identifiers are both 12 digits under the same National Registers Law the Rules text itself cites), rather than an independently confirmed box count. Column C's 3 boxes, visually confirmed directly on image 188, match the same country classifier pattern already established for this schedule series (e.g. entry1ResidenceCountryCode on Forms 220.03/220.04/220.06). Column F's 2 boxes were visually confirmed on image 189 (cropped and read at 2x zoom), giving the ^[0-9]{2}$ pattern. Column E's single box, also visually confirmed on the same crop, backs the four-value string enum. Column D (nonresident registration number) has no confirmed box layout — Item 39(4) describes it only as a free-text registration number in the counterparty's own country, with no digit-count or format constraint asserted by this schema, the same conservative choice used for this schedule's own column-D counterpart on other siblings whose format the Rules text does not specify. Column G was visually confirmed on image 189 as two distinct sub-fields (a wider free-text 'Номер' box and a separate 'Цифрами дня, месяца, года' date box grouping) and is modelled as two fields (entryNDocumentNumber, entryNDocumentDate).

Discrepancy disclosed, not resolved: the form's own printed footnote (page 1) states columns D and E are not filled when propertyTypeCode is '4' (receiving deductions/contributions on a gratuitous basis), while the Rules text's own Item 39(6) instead states column F is not filled for that same case. Both were independently re-read this cycle (the footnote via a zoomed crop of image 188, confirming the literal text 'графы D и Е', not 'D и F'; the Rules text via the Order's own HTML). This schema transcribes both statements verbatim into the affected fields' own descriptions rather than picking one as authoritative or inventing a requiredWhen rule that would silently favor one source over the other — consistent with this registry's practice of disclosing genuine primary-source ambiguities rather than resolving them by assumption.

The remaining three schedules (220.08, 220.09, 220.10) remain disclosed, open backlog for future companion-schema cycles, now that the adilet.zan.kz image outage has cleared. No submission was made and no live kgd.gov.kz/cabinet.salyk.kz account was created or required to author this schema.

fields.name: iin
fields.label: ИИН
fields.description: The taxpayer's 12-digit Individual Identification Number (ИИН), the same identifier used on the main Form 220.00 declaration this schedule is attached to. If the tax obligation is performed by a trust manager, this line shows the trust manager's own IIN instead.

fields.name: taxPeriodYear
fields.label: Налоговый период, за который представляется налоговая отчетность: год
fields.description: The calendar year of the tax period for which this schedule is filed.

fields.name: currentSheetNumber
fields.label: Укажите номер текущего листа
fields.description: The sequential sheet number of this physical page, printed in a boxed header field distinct from the numbered Item 38 rows — used when a taxpayer's gratuitously-received/transferred-property entries exceed this schedule's single-sheet 12-row capacity and require additional continuation sheets of the same form.

fields.name: totalAmountReceivedAmount
fields.label: ИТОГО, графа H (сумма безвозмездно полученного имущества)
fields.description: Total value of gratuitously received property (charitable assistance, sponsorship assistance, money and other property, or income under a government social contract/deposit interest/condominium contributions), summed across every entry row below — the form's own printed total row (row number fixed at 00000001), filled only with the grand total, not a per-entry amount. In national currency (tenge).

fields.name: totalAmountTransferredAmount
fields.label: ИТОГО, графа I (сумма безвозмездно переданного имущества)
fields.description: Total value of gratuitously transferred (given) property, summed across every entry row below — the form's own printed total row (row number fixed at 00000001), filled only with the grand total, not a per-entry amount. In national currency (tenge).

fields.name: entry1CounterpartyIdentifier
fields.label: БИН юридического лица/ИИН физического лица
fields.description: The 12-digit Business Identification Number (БИН) of the legal entity, or Individual Identification Number (ИИН) of the individual, named in column D of entry row 1 — the counterparty that gratuitously transferred or received the property. Per Item 39(2) of the Order's own Rules, this line is filled only if the legal or physical person has a BIN (IIN) under the Law of the Republic of Kazakhstan "On National Registers of Identification Numbers" — i.e. left blank for counterparties without a Kazakhstani BIN/IIN (e.g. most non-residents).

fields.name: entry1ResidenceCountryCode
fields.label: Код страны резидентства
fields.description: Code of the country of tax residency of the counterparty in entry row 1 (column C), per Item 39(3) of the Order's own Rules and Item 56 of the same Rules — the Customs Union's own external country classifier ("Классификатор стран мира"), not enumerated inline on this form.

fields.name: entry1NonresidentRegistrationNumber
fields.label: Регистрационный номер нерезидента в стране резидентства
fields.description: The registration number, in its country of residence, of the non-resident that gratuitously transferred (received) the property reported in entry row 1 (column D). Per Item 39(4) of the Order's own Rules. Per the form's own printed footnote ("* При получении отчислений на безвозмездной основе графы D и Е не заполняются" — when receiving deductions/contributions on a gratuitous basis, columns D and E are not filled), this field is left blank when propertyTypeCode is "4" — a discrepancy from the Rules text's own Item 39(6), which instead states column F (not D or E) is not filled for that same case; both texts are transcribed as printed rather than reconciled by this schema.

fields.name: entry1PropertyTypeCode
fields.label: Код вида безвозмездно полученного (переданного) имущества
fields.description: Code of the type of gratuitously received (transferred) property, per Item 39(5) of the Order's own Rules: "1" = charitable assistance (благотворительная помощь); "2" = sponsorship assistance (спонсорская помощь); "3" = money and other property received (transferred) on a gratuitous basis (деньги и другое имущество, полученное (переданное) на безвозмездной основе); "4" = income under a government social-contract agreement, deposit interest, and condominium participants' contributions (доходы по договору на осуществление государственного социального заказа, вознаграждение по депозитам и взносы участников кондоминиума). Reported for entry row 1 (column E). See entry1NonresidentRegistrationNumber's own description for the form's printed footnote asserting this column is also left blank for propertyTypeCode "4", alongside column D.

fields.name: entry1PropertyCode
fields.label: Код имущества
fields.description: Code of the property received free of charge, for entry row 1 (column F), per Item 39(6) of the Order's own Rules and Item 58 of the same Rules — an external classifier not enumerated inline on this form. Per Item 39(6)'s own text, this column is not filled when the receipt is a deduction/contribution received on a gratuitous basis (propertyTypeCode "4").

fields.name: entry1DocumentNumber
fields.label: Номер документа
fields.description: The number of the document confirming the gratuitous receipt (transfer) of property reported in entry row 1 (column G, left sub-field). Per Item 39(7) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry1DocumentDate
fields.label: Дата документа
fields.description: The date of the document confirming the gratuitous receipt (transfer) of property reported in entry row 1 (column G, right sub-field, printed "Цифрами дня, месяца, года" — in digits: day, month, year). Per Item 39(7) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry1AmountReceived
fields.label: Сумма (стоимость) безвозмездно полученного имущества
fields.description: The amount (value) of property gratuitously received, for entry row 1 (column H), in national currency (tenge). Per Item 39(8) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry1AmountTransferred
fields.label: Сумма (стоимость) безвозмездно переданного имущества
fields.description: The amount (value) of property gratuitously transferred (given), for entry row 1 (column I), in national currency (tenge). Per Item 39(9) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry2CounterpartyIdentifier
fields.label: БИН юридического лица/ИИН физического лица
fields.description: The 12-digit Business Identification Number (БИН) of the legal entity, or Individual Identification Number (ИИН) of the individual, named in column D of entry row 2 — the counterparty that gratuitously transferred or received the property. Per Item 39(2) of the Order's own Rules, this line is filled only if the legal or physical person has a BIN (IIN) under the Law of the Republic of Kazakhstan "On National Registers of Identification Numbers" — i.e. left blank for counterparties without a Kazakhstani BIN/IIN (e.g. most non-residents).

fields.name: entry2ResidenceCountryCode
fields.label: Код страны резидентства
fields.description: Code of the country of tax residency of the counterparty in entry row 2 (column C), per Item 39(3) of the Order's own Rules and Item 56 of the same Rules — the Customs Union's own external country classifier ("Классификатор стран мира"), not enumerated inline on this form.

fields.name: entry2NonresidentRegistrationNumber
fields.label: Регистрационный номер нерезидента в стране резидентства
fields.description: The registration number, in its country of residence, of the non-resident that gratuitously transferred (received) the property reported in entry row 2 (column D). Per Item 39(4) of the Order's own Rules. Per the form's own printed footnote ("* При получении отчислений на безвозмездной основе графы D и Е не заполняются" — when receiving deductions/contributions on a gratuitous basis, columns D and E are not filled), this field is left blank when propertyTypeCode is "4" — a discrepancy from the Rules text's own Item 39(6), which instead states column F (not D or E) is not filled for that same case; both texts are transcribed as printed rather than reconciled by this schema.

fields.name: entry2PropertyTypeCode
fields.label: Код вида безвозмездно полученного (переданного) имущества
fields.description: Code of the type of gratuitously received (transferred) property, per Item 39(5) of the Order's own Rules: "1" = charitable assistance (благотворительная помощь); "2" = sponsorship assistance (спонсорская помощь); "3" = money and other property received (transferred) on a gratuitous basis (деньги и другое имущество, полученное (переданное) на безвозмездной основе); "4" = income under a government social-contract agreement, deposit interest, and condominium participants' contributions (доходы по договору на осуществление государственного социального заказа, вознаграждение по депозитам и взносы участников кондоминиума). Reported for entry row 2 (column E). See entry2NonresidentRegistrationNumber's own description for the form's printed footnote asserting this column is also left blank for propertyTypeCode "4", alongside column D.

fields.name: entry2PropertyCode
fields.label: Код имущества
fields.description: Code of the property received free of charge, for entry row 2 (column F), per Item 39(6) of the Order's own Rules and Item 58 of the same Rules — an external classifier not enumerated inline on this form. Per Item 39(6)'s own text, this column is not filled when the receipt is a deduction/contribution received on a gratuitous basis (propertyTypeCode "4").

fields.name: entry2DocumentNumber
fields.label: Номер документа
fields.description: The number of the document confirming the gratuitous receipt (transfer) of property reported in entry row 2 (column G, left sub-field). Per Item 39(7) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry2DocumentDate
fields.label: Дата документа
fields.description: The date of the document confirming the gratuitous receipt (transfer) of property reported in entry row 2 (column G, right sub-field, printed "Цифрами дня, месяца, года" — in digits: day, month, year). Per Item 39(7) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry2AmountReceived
fields.label: Сумма (стоимость) безвозмездно полученного имущества
fields.description: The amount (value) of property gratuitously received, for entry row 2 (column H), in national currency (tenge). Per Item 39(8) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry2AmountTransferred
fields.label: Сумма (стоимость) безвозмездно переданного имущества
fields.description: The amount (value) of property gratuitously transferred (given), for entry row 2 (column I), in national currency (tenge). Per Item 39(9) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry3CounterpartyIdentifier
fields.label: БИН юридического лица/ИИН физического лица
fields.description: The 12-digit Business Identification Number (БИН) of the legal entity, or Individual Identification Number (ИИН) of the individual, named in column D of entry row 3 — the counterparty that gratuitously transferred or received the property. Per Item 39(2) of the Order's own Rules, this line is filled only if the legal or physical person has a BIN (IIN) under the Law of the Republic of Kazakhstan "On National Registers of Identification Numbers" — i.e. left blank for counterparties without a Kazakhstani BIN/IIN (e.g. most non-residents).

fields.name: entry4AmountTransferred
fields.label: Сумма (стоимость) безвозмездно переданного имущества
fields.description: The amount (value) of property gratuitously transferred (given), for entry row 4 (column I), in national currency (tenge). Per Item 39(9) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry5CounterpartyIdentifier
fields.label: БИН юридического лица/ИИН физического лица
fields.description: The 12-digit Business Identification Number (БИН) of the legal entity, or Individual Identification Number (ИИН) of the individual, named in column D of entry row 5 — the counterparty that gratuitously transferred or received the property. Per Item 39(2) of the Order's own Rules, this line is filled only if the legal or physical person has a BIN (IIN) under the Law of the Republic of Kazakhstan "On National Registers of Identification Numbers" — i.e. left blank for counterparties without a Kazakhstani BIN/IIN (e.g. most non-residents).

fields.name: entry5ResidenceCountryCode
fields.label: Код страны резидентства
fields.description: Code of the country of tax residency of the counterparty in entry row 5 (column C), per Item 39(3) of the Order's own Rules and Item 56 of the same Rules — the Customs Union's own external country classifier ("Классификатор стран мира"), not enumerated inline on this form.

fields.name: entry5NonresidentRegistrationNumber
fields.label: Регистрационный номер нерезидента в стране резидентства
fields.description: The registration number, in its country of residence, of the non-resident that gratuitously transferred (received) the property reported in entry row 5 (column D). Per Item 39(4) of the Order's own Rules. Per the form's own printed footnote ("* При получении отчислений на безвозмездной основе графы D и Е не заполняются" — when receiving deductions/contributions on a gratuitous basis, columns D and E are not filled), this field is left blank when propertyTypeCode is "4" — a discrepancy from the Rules text's own Item 39(6), which instead states column F (not D or E) is not filled for that same case; both texts are transcribed as printed rather than reconciled by this schema.

fields.name: entry5PropertyTypeCode
fields.label: Код вида безвозмездно полученного (переданного) имущества
fields.description: Code of the type of gratuitously received (transferred) property, per Item 39(5) of the Order's own Rules: "1" = charitable assistance (благотворительная помощь); "2" = sponsorship assistance (спонсорская помощь); "3" = money and other property received (transferred) on a gratuitous basis (деньги и другое имущество, полученное (переданное) на безвозмездной основе); "4" = income under a government social-contract agreement, deposit interest, and condominium participants' contributions (доходы по договору на осуществление государственного социального заказа, вознаграждение по депозитам и взносы участников кондоминиума). fields.name: entry5PropertyCode
fields.label: Код имущества
fields.description: Code of the property received free of charge, for entry row 5 (column F), per Item 39(6) of the Order's own Rules and Item 58 of the same Rules — an external classifier not enumerated inline on this form. Per Item 39(6)'s own text, this column is not filled when the receipt is a deduction/contribution received on a gratuitous basis (propertyTypeCode "4").

fields.description: The number of the document confirming the gratuitous receipt (transfer) of property reported in entry row 5 (column G, left sub-field). Per Item 39(7) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry5DocumentDate
fields.label: Дата документа
fields.description: The date of the document confirming the gratuitous receipt (transfer) of property reported in entry row 5 (column G, right sub-field, printed "Цифрами дня, месяца, года" — in digits: day, month, year). Per Item 39(7) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry11ResidenceCountryCode
fields.label: Код страны резидентства
fields.description: Code of the country of tax residency of the counterparty in entry row 11 (column C), per Item 39(3) of the Order's own Rules and Item 56 of the same Rules — the Customs Union's own external country classifier ("Классификатор стран мира"), not enumerated inline on this form.

fields.name: entry11NonresidentRegistrationNumber
fields.label: Регистрационный номер нерезидента в стране резидентства
fields.description: The registration number, in its country of residence, of the non-resident that gratuitously transferred (received) the property reported in entry row 11 (column D). Per Item 39(4) of the Order's own Rules. Per the form's own printed footnote ("* При получении отчислений на безвозмездной основе графы D и Е не заполняются" — when receiving deductions/contributions on a gratuitous basis, columns D and E are not filled), this field is left blank when propertyTypeCode is "4" — a discrepancy from the Rules text's own Item 39(6), which instead states column F (not D or E) is not filled for that same case; both texts are transcribed as printed rather than reconciled by this schema.

fields.name: entry11PropertyTypeCode
fields.label: Код вида безвозмездно полученного (переданного) имущества
fields.description: Code of the type of gratuitously received (transferred) property, per Item 39(5) of the Order's own Rules: "1" = charitable assistance (благотворительная помощь); "2" = sponsorship assistance (спонсорская помощь); "3" = money and other property received (transferred) on a gratuitous basis (деньги и другое имущество, полученное (переданное) на безвозмездной основе); "4" = income under a government social-contract agreement, deposit interest, and condominium participants' contributions (доходы по договору на осуществление государственного социального заказа, вознаграждение по депозитам и взносы участников кондоминиума). Reported for entry row 11 (column E). See entry11NonresidentRegistrationNumber's own description for the form's printed footnote asserting this column is also left blank for propertyTypeCode "4", alongside column D.

fields.name: entry11PropertyCode
fields.label: Код имущества
fields.description: Code of the property received free of charge, for entry row 11 (column F), per Item 39(6) of the Order's own Rules and Item 58 of the same Rules — an external classifier not enumerated inline on this form. Per Item 39(6)'s own text, this column is not filled when the receipt is a deduction/contribution received on a gratuitous basis (propertyTypeCode "4").

fields.name: entry11DocumentNumber
fields.label: Номер документа
fields.description: The number of the document confirming the gratuitous receipt (transfer) of property reported in entry row 11 (column G, left sub-field). Per Item 39(7) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry11DocumentDate
fields.label: Дата документа
fields.description: The date of the document confirming the gratuitous receipt (transfer) of property reported in entry row 11 (column G, right sub-field, printed "Цифрами дня, месяца, года" — in digits: day, month, year). Per Item 39(7) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry11AmountReceived
fields.label: Сумма (стоимость) безвозмездно полученного имущества
fields.description: The amount (value) of property gratuitously received, for entry row 11 (column H), in national currency (tenge). Per Item 39(8) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry11AmountTransferred
fields.label: Сумма (стоимость) безвозмездно переданного имущества
fields.description: The amount (value) of property gratuitously transferred (given), for entry row 11 (column I), in national currency (tenge). Per Item 39(9) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.name: entry12CounterpartyIdentifier
fields.label: БИН юридического лица/ИИН физического лица
fields.description: The 12-digit Business Identification Number (БИН) of the legal entity, or Individual Identification Number (ИИН) of the individual, named in column D of entry row 12 — the counterparty that gratuitously transferred or received the property. Per Item 39(2) of the Order's own Rules, this line is filled only if the legal or physical person has a BIN (IIN) under the Law of the Republic of Kazakhstan "On National Registers of Identification Numbers" — i.e. left blank for counterparties without a Kazakhstani BIN/IIN (e.g. most non-residents).

fields.name: entry12ResidenceCountryCode
fields.label: Код страны резидентства
fields.description: Code of the country of tax residency of the counterparty in entry row 12 (column C), per Item 39(3) of the Order's own Rules and Item 56 of the same Rules — the Customs Union's own external country classifier ("Классификатор стран мира"), not enumerated inline on this form.

fields.name: entry12NonresidentRegistrationNumber
fields.label: Регистрационный номер нерезидента в стране резидентства
fields.description: The registration number, in its country of residence, of the non-resident that gratuitously transferred (received) the property reported in entry row 12 (column D). Per Item 39(4) of the Order's own Rules. Per the form's own printed footnote ("* При получении отчислений на безвозмездной основе графы D и Е не заполняются" — when receiving deductions/contributions on a gratuitous basis, columns D and E are not filled), this field is left blank when propertyTypeCode is "4" — a discrepancy from the Rules text's own Item 39(6), which instead states column F (not D or E) is not filled for that same case; both texts are transcribed as printed rather than reconciled by this schema.

Per Item 39(6)'s own text, this column is not filled when the receipt is a deduction/contribution received on a gratuitous basis (propertyTypeCode "4").

fields.description: The date of the document confirming the gratuitous receipt (transfer) of property reported in entry row 12 (column G, right sub-field, printed "Цифрами дня, месяца, года" — in digits: day, month, year). Per Item 39(7) of the Order's own Rules.

fields.description: The amount (value) of property gratuitously received, for entry row 12 (column H), in national currency (tenge). Per Item 39(8) of the Order's own Rules.
